title: salix × leiophylla
intro: Salix × leiophylla, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the Gooley willow (Salix × sepulcralis 'Gooley'). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × leiophylla include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from fever and headaches. Herbal preparations of Salix × leiophylla can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and menstrual cramps.
